steps.name: the user lands on the home screen with search functionality available

elements.name: Verify user can search product and validate checkout behavior and remove product

steps.name: the user searches for "bread" from the home screen
the user selects "bread" from the search suggestions
the results page should display text containing "Results for 'bread'"
list of products displayed with product name and price information
the user opens a product from the search results
the product details screen should display the product name and price
the user scrolls through the product details screen to view details sections displaying
the user adds the product to the cart
the user navigates to the cart screen
the cart should display the added product
the user adds a substitution for the selected product
the user proceeds to the checkout flow
the application should display available delivery time slots
the FreshPass promotional banner should be visible
the place order button should remain disabled until required details are completed
the user navigates back to the cart
the user removes the product from the cart
the cart should display an empty cart message "Your cart is berry lonely. Let's add to it."

arguments.val: "Your cart is berry lonely. Let's add to it."

steps.name: the user lands on the home screen with search functionality available

elements.name: Verify user can search product and validate checkout behavior and remove product

steps.name: the user searches for "milk" from the home screen
the user selects "milk" from the search suggestions
the results page should display text containing "Results for 'milk'"
list of products displayed with product name and price information
the user opens a product from the search results
the product details screen should display the product name and price
the user scrolls through the product details screen to view details sections displaying
the user adds the product to the cart
the user navigates to the cart screen
the cart should display the added product
the user adds a substitution for the selected product
the user proceeds to the checkout flow
the application should display available delivery time slots
the FreshPass promotional banner should be visible
the place order button should remain disabled until required details are completed
the user navigates back to the cart
the user removes the product from the cart
the cart should display an empty cart message "Your cart is berry lonely. Let's add to it."

arguments.val: "Your cart is berry lonely. Let's add to it."

the user navigates back to the cart
